name: param-sweeps

metadata.name: param-sweeps
metadata.summary: Parameter sweeper for ui.json powered applications

documentation:
# Param-sweeps

A Parameter sweeper for applications driven by ui.json files

This package contains two main modules. One is for generating sweep
files, and the other is to run a sweep over some number of parameters
in a driver application.

## Basic Usage

To generate a sweep file from a ui.json file for an existing
application, use the following command:

```
$ python -m param_sweeps.generate some_file.ui.json
```

This will create a new `some_file_sweep.ui.json` file that may be run
with:

```
$ python -m param_sweeps.driver some_file_sweep.ui.json
```

By default, this would execute a single run of the original parameters.
To design a sweep, simply drag the `some_file_sweep.ui.json` file into
[Geoscience ANALYST Pro](https://mirageoscience.com/mining-industry-software/geoscience-analyst-pro/).
session that produced the original file and select start, end, and number
of samples values for parameters that you would like to sweep.

To organize the output, param-sweeps uses a `UUID` file naming scheme, with
a `lookup.json` file to map individual parameter sets back to their respective
files.

functions.name: param_sweeps.generate.generate
documentation:
Generate an \_sweep.ui.json file to sweep parameters of the driver associated with 'file'.

```
param file

Name of .ui.json file

param parameters

Parameters to include in the _sweep.ui.json file

param update_values

Updates for sweep files parameters
```

functions.name: param_sweeps.generate.sweep_forms
documentation:
Return a set of three ui.json entries for start, end and n (samples).

```
param param

Parameter name

param value

Parameter value
```

functions.name: param_sweeps.driver.call_worker
documentation: Runs the worker for the sweep parameters contained in 'ifile'.

functions.name: param_sweeps.driver.file_validation
documentation: Validate file.

functions.name: param_sweeps.driver.main
documentation: Run the program.

classes.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepParams

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepParams.from_input_file
documentation: Instantiate params class with contents of input file data.

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepParams.worker_uijson
documentation: Path to ui.json for worker application.

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepParams.worker_parameters
documentation: Return all sweep parameter names.

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepParams.parameter_sets
documentation: Return sets of parameter values that will be combined to form the sweep.
Parametrizes a sweep of the worker driver.

classes.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepDriver

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepDriver.uuid_from_params
documentation:
Create a deterministic uuid.

```
param params

Tuple containing the values of a sweep iteration.

returns

Unique but recoverable uuid file identifier string.
```

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepDriver.get_lookup
documentation: Generate lookup table for sweep trials.

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepDriver.update_lookup
documentation: Updates lookup with new entries. Ensures any previous runs are incorporated.

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepDriver.write_files
documentation: Write ui.geoh5 and ui.json files for sweep trials.

methods.name: param_sweeps.driver.SweepDriver.run
documentation: Execute a sweep.
Sweeps parameters of a worker driver.
